---
title: "Part F. Tools"
---

The CRCO provides a suite of online services and tools to help airspace users manage their billing, declarations, claims, and route estimations.

## F.1. CRCO CEFA Portal

The **CEFA (Central Eurocontrol Financial Agency) Portal** is a secured, confidential online platform designed for exchanging billing and fleet data between airspace users and the CRCO.

::: {.callout-tip}
### Register for CEFA
Access is free and highly recommended. You can enroll online at: [https://www.eurocontrol.int/tool/cefa](https://www.eurocontrol.int/tool/cefa)
:::

### Core Features:
*   **Billing Downloads**: Instantly download your monthly invoices, statements, and detailed flight logs.
*   **Credit Card Payments**: Settle outstanding bills online securely using Visa or Mastercard.
*   **Real-time Statements**: Access daily statements showing the latest accounting actions (payments, adjustments).
*   **Fleet Declarations**: Submit and modify aircraft registrations and MTOW values (AFMs) to ensure correct billing weight factors.
*   **Account Profile Settings**: Request modifications to legal addresses, contact details, VAT numbers, and invoice delivery options.
*   **Fast Claim Processing**: Submit claim requests online, upload supporting documents, and track their verification status.

---

## F.2. CRCO DATALINK

For users with automated accounting systems, the CRCO offers billing documents in structured electronic formats via the **CRCO*DATALINK** service.

*   **Enrolment**: Send an email request to [crco.cefa@eurocontrol.int](mailto:crco.cefa@eurocontrol.int). Data is available starting from the billing cycle *after* the request is made.
*   **Formats**: Available in **TXT** and **XLS** (Excel) files.

::: {.panel-tabset}
### Text Format (.txt)
A comprehensive data stream designed for automated database imports. It contains extensive flight detail elements not shown on standard paper or PDF statements:
*   Precise route crossing coordinates and times.
*   Charges and great circle distances per charging zone overflown.
*   Aircraft registration and exact weight factor used.
*   *Refer to the CRCO*DATALINK Technical Handbook on CEFA for file layout schemas.*

### Excel Format (.xls)
A simplified, user-friendly spreadsheet. It is directly exploitable and ideal for small to medium operators looking to perform simple calculations and reviews in spreadsheets.
:::

---

## F.3. RSO Distance Tool

The **Route per State Overflown (RSO) Distance Tool** is a software application that assists operators in estimating route charges for planned flights.

*   **Function**: Computes flight distances within individual state charging zones based on proposed flight plan routing.
*   **Download Link**: [RSO Distance Tool Download](https://www.eurocontrol.int/online-tool/route-state-overflown-distance-tool)
*   **Example Output**: See [Annex B](annexes.qmd#annex-b.-rso-route-charges-estimation) for an example of a printout generated by the RSO tool.

::: {.callout-warning}
While third-party route planning tools exist on the market, many only provide approximate calculations. The RSO Distance Tool is the recommended software for checking charges against official EUROCONTROL bills.
:::
